summary: Configurable deposit settings feature fully tested and verified. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed that dashboard shows deposit metrics, programs page shows deposit config (type, value, deposit/balance amounts), booking detail dialog shows deposit/balance, and public booking form shows deposit proof upload.
seed_data_creation: Created test bookings with TEST_Deposit_Config_, TEST_Pct_, TEST_Fixed_, TEST_Cap_ prefixes during backend tests for deposit computation verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Configurable deposit settings are fully functional. Programs have deposit_type (percentage/fixed) and deposit_value fields. Bookings compute deposit_amount and balance_amount from the program_snapshot's deposit config. Dashboard shows total_deposit_expected, total_deposit_collected, total_balance_expected, total_balance_collected metrics. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_deposit_configuration.py covers all scenarios.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/public/programs: Returns programs with deposit_type and deposit_value fields
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/programs: Returns programs with deposit_type and deposit_value fields
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/admin/programs/{id}: Accepts and updates deposit_type and deposit_value
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/bookings: Returns bookings with computed deposit_amount and balance_amount
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/bookings/{id}: Returns booking detail with deposit_amount, balance_amount, program_snapshot containing deposit config
backend_endpoints.POST /api/admin/bookings/manual: Creates booking with program_snapshot containing deposit config
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/dashboard: Returns metrics with total_deposit_expected, total_deposit_collected, total_balance_expected, total_balance_collected

deposit_computation_formulas.backward_compatibility: Old bookings without deposit config in snapshot default to deposit_type=percentage, deposit_value=100 (full price as deposit)

frontend_elements.dashboard: Shows 'Depósitos cobrados' (Deposits collected) and 'Saldo por cobrar' (Balance outstanding) metric cards
frontend_elements.programs_page: Shows deposit info on cards: 'Depósito: 50% · $225 + $225' format
frontend_elements.program_form: Has deposit_type dropdown (Porcentaje/Percentage, Monto fijo/Fixed amount) and deposit_value input
frontend_elements.reservations_table: Shows payment status column with 'Depósito pendiente', 'Depósito verificado', 'Saldo pendiente', 'Pagado completo' badges
frontend_elements.public_booking_form: Shows 'Comprobante de depósito' / 'Deposit proof' for file upload
